title: AntoKueh Ceramic Dinner Plates Set of 6, White Salad Plates 10.3 Inch/26cm Large Round - Scratch, Chip Resistant & Lead-Free, Dishwasher & Microwave Safe for Steak, Dessert, Pasta
features: 🌟Versatile Use & Practical Rim🌟 AntoKueh white 10.3-inch (26cm) dinner plates are perfect for serving steaks, pasta, salads, or pizza. Featuring a thoughtfully designed lipped rim, these plates not only prevent sauces from spilling but also make them secure to carry and exceptionally stackable for space-saving storage.

🌟Unbox Perfection & Zero Breakage🌟 Rest easy knowing these ceramic plates will arrive in pristine condition, every time. Our plates are renowned for their secure & compact packaging in America and Canada, meticulously engineered to prevent shipping damage. With a flawless track record and zero customer complaints about breakage, we promise perfect delivery so you can shop with absolute confidence.

🌟Premium & Durable🌟 Crafted from high-quality, lead-free and cadmium-free ceramic and fired at over 1250°C, these large ceramic plates are exceptionally robust and chip-resistant, scratch-resistant.The hardened glaze resists scratches from cutlery and prevents chipping, ensuring your plates stay beautifully new-looking for years to come.

🌟Freezer-to-Oven Safety and Easy to Clean🌟 Our plates are built for everyday use and completely safe for microwave, oven, and freezer. They are designed to withstand thermal shock, making it safe to go from freezer (-20°C) to oven (250°C) without warping! The smooth, non-porous surface makes cleanup a breeze—simply handwash in seconds or trust them in the dishwasher for a spotless shine.

🌟An Unforgettable Gift Idea🌟Safe and compact packaged, this set of 6 plates make a thoughtful and practical gift for weddings, housewarmings, birthdays, and holidays. White represents purity and classicism, It's a gift of art and utility that will be cherished for years to come.
